name: MONSTER BEVERAGE CORPORATION
description: Parent company of Monster Energy brands, headquartered in Corona, California, with over 6,000 employees

description.value: Parent company of Monster Energy brands, headquartered in Corona, California, with over 6,000 employees

esg_policy.value: Monster Beverage Corporation’s ESG policy framework is outlined in its sustainability reports and includes environmental initiatives such as a Water Stewardship Policy (adopted December 26 2023) that monitors and manages water use, targets to reduce greenhouse‑gas emissions, increase recycled content in packaging, and broader corporate social responsibility and governance commitments.
